text: Last class you hosted your client at dinner with polite requests.
Today you say a warm goodbye and plan how to stay in touch.
Farewell
See off
Grateful
Memorable
Hospitality
Productive
Fruitful
Stay in touch
Stop by

Sincerely
Regards
I am going to send you the final figures.
We are going to stay in touch by email.
She is going to visit us in Geneva next year.
I am not going to forget this productive week.
Well, Clara, here we are at the airport. Thank you for a memorable and productive week. I am so grateful you came.
Thank YOU, Walyson. Your hospitality was wonderful. It was a truly fruitful trip. What happens next?
Next week I am going to send you the final figures, and I am going to call my manager to report on the visit.
Perfect. We are going to stay in touch by email, then. And next year you must stop by our office in Geneva.
I would love that. Looking ahead, I am sure we are going to do great things together. Have a safe flight.
Thank you for everything, and for seeing me off. Goodbye for now, and a warm farewell. Best regards to your team!
Thank you for a memorable and productive visit.
I am going to send you the report next week.
Let us stay in touch by email.
Please stop by our office whenever you travel here.
Have a safe flight, and a warm farewell!

Hi Walyson, this is Clara. I am at the airport now, about to board my flight home, and I wanted to leave you a quick message before I go. Thank you so much for a wonderful and productive visit. The dinner last night was memorable, and your hospitality all week was simply outstanding. I really feel that our companies are going to build a strong, lasting relationship. As soon as I am back in the office, I am going to send you the final figures, and I am going to talk to my director about the next steps. Let us definitely stay in touch by email, and I hope you are going to visit us in Geneva very soon. Once again, thank you for everything. It has been a fruitful trip. Safe travels to you too, and goodbye for now.

This is my note after seeing Clara off at the airport. It has been a truly fruitful visit, and I am grateful for the chance to host such an important client. Tomorrow I am going to write a short thank-you email to Clara, and I am going to keep my message warm but professional. I will end it with sincerely and best regards. Next week I am going to call my manager to report on the visit, and I am going to prepare the figures Clara asked for. I really hope we are going to stay in touch and that she is going to stop by again next year. A good farewell is just as important as a good welcome; it shows the client that I value the relationship and that I am looking ahead to working together for a long time.

First, thank your guest sincerely for the visit and say how productive it has been. Next, mention one memorable moment from the week to make the goodbye warm and personal. After that, talk about the future using be going to, for example I am going to send you the report and we are going to stay in touch. Then, exchange contact details and agree how you are going to keep in touch. Finally, see your guest off, wish them safe travels, and say a warm farewell.

Grateful

Hospitality
Productive
Fruitful
Stay in touch

Sincerely
Regards

Thank you for a memorable and productive visit.

Have a safe flight, and a warm farewell.
